popularStory.headline: Memorial
popularStory.description: Agnès was the daughter of Richard d'Evreux and Godechilde (widow of Roger "de Conches" de Tosny), so she was raised as a younger sister of the de Tosny children. She married Simon I de Montfort, Seign …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnès d'Évereux於1045年11月1日出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾艾福時，她的父親Richard comte d'Évreux45歲，母親Godehildis41歲。她和Simon de Montfort至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1116年2月14日在法國瑟-吉瓦蒙特福吉利曼利享年70歲，埋葬在法國崔艾-吉洛易艾白農。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnès d'Évereux于1045年11月1日出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾艾福时，她的父亲Richard comte d'Évreux45岁，母亲Godehildis41岁。她和Simon de Montfort至少有4个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1116年2月14日在法国瑟-吉瓦蒙特福吉利曼利享年70岁，埋葬在法国崔艾-吉洛易艾白農。

nameMeanings.name: d'Évereux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Sean.
English and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name for someone from Évreux in Eure, France, with the preposition d(e). See also Everest for the name without the preposition.

History: This was the surname of the Earls of Essex from 1572 to 1641. Walter Devereux, 1st Earl of Essex, led an attempted colonization of Ulster, and his son, Robert, 2nd Earl of Essex, briefly held the position of lord lieutenant of Ireland in 1599.

variants.name: Devereaux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Everest
meanings: English (southeastern): of Norman origin, a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de). Compare Evers .

variants.name: Evers
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de).

English: de-aspirated variant of Heaver, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Hever (Kent), named from Old English hēah ‘high’ + (Kentish) Old English ēfre ‘edge or brow of a hill’. Alternatively, the name may derive from some minor place in southeastern England named with Old English ȳfre, (Kentish) Old English ēfre, Middle English evere ‘edge or brow of a hill, tip of a promontory’, with the addition of a prosthetic H-.
North German and Dutch: genitivized patronymic from the personal name Evert , which lost its t in pronunciation and spelling subsequently; compare Everts . Compare also Avers .

variants.name: Deveraux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devery
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Kieran, Brendan, Clancy.
Irish (Offaly): of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devary
meanings: Probably Irish: variant of Devery, a variant of Devereux in counties Leix and Offaly.

variants.name: Debrow
meanings: Altered form of English or Irish   Devereux  .

nameMeanings.name: Agnès
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnès d'Évereux was born on 1 November 1045, in Évreux, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, her father, Richard comte d'Évreux, was 45 and her mother, Godehildis, was 41. She had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Simon de Montfort. She died on 14 February 1116, in Montfort-l'Amaury, Seine-et-Oise, France, at the age of 70, and was buried in Épernon, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnès d'Évereux est née le 1 novembre 1045, à Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Richard comte d'Évreux, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Godehildis, avait 41 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Simon de Montfort. Elle est décédée le 14 février 1116, à Montfort-l'Amaury, Seine-et-Oise, France, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Épernon, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnès d'Évereux am 1. November 1045 in Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard comte d'Évreux 45 und ihre Mutter Godehildis 41. Sie hatte mit Simon de Montfort mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Februar 1116 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Montfort-l'Amaury, Seine-et-Oise, Frankreich und wurde in Épernon, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès d'Évereux è nata il il 1 novembre 1045 nel Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Richard comte d'Évreux, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Godehildis, aveva 41 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Simon de Montfort. Morì il 14 febbraio 1116, nel Montfort-l'Amaury, Seine-et-Oise, Francia, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Épernon, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnès d'Évereuxが1045年11月1日にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアevレウックスで生まれた時，父Richard comte d'Évreuxは45歳，母Godehildisは41歳であった。彼女はSimon de Montfortとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1116年2月14日にフランスセアイネ-エト-オイゼモントフォート-ル'アマアウリーで70歳で死去し，フランスセントアエウレ-エト-ロイルeペルノンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnès d'Évereux(이)가 1045년 11월 1일 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 e브레우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard comte d'Évreux(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Godehildis(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 Simon de Montfort(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1116년 2월 14일 프랑스 세이인-트-이스 몽포트-'아모리에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세트르 우레-트-로이르 e퍼넌에 묻혔다.

pt.1 November 1045–14 February 1116: 1 de novembro de 1045–14 de fevereiro de 1116
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnès d'Évereux nasceu em 1 de novembro de 1045, em Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Richard comte d'Évreux, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Godehildis, tinha 41 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas com Simon de Montfort. Ela faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1116, em Montfort-l'Amaury, Seine-et-Oise, França, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Épernon, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnès d'Évereux родилась 1 ноября 1045 г. в местности eвреукс, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Richard comte d'Évreux было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Godehildis, 41. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери от Simon de Montfort. Она умерла 14 февраля 1116 г. в местности монтфорт-л'амаури, сине-ет-оис, Франция в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности eпирнон, эуре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция.

es.1 November 1045–14 February 1116: 1 de noviembre de 1045–14 de febrero de 1116
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnès d'Évereux nació el 1 de noviembre de 1045, en Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Richard comte d'Évreux, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Godehildis, tenía 41 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas con Simon de Montfort. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1116, en Montfort-l'Amaury, Seine-et-Oise, Francia, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Épernon, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia.
